description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and clean lines. The exterior combines white plastered walls with sections of stone cladding and extensive wooden decking, creating a visually appealing contrast. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front entrance is accentuated by a landscaped pathway, manicured shrubs, and a raised porch area. The property includes a spacious green lawn and a driveway leading to a covered parking area. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white walls, stone accents, large windows, wooden decks, and landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, raised porch, stone cladding, and manicured shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, covered parking area, and expansive green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large lawn, back facade with multiple windows, and elevated structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the extended deck, stone base, and side entrance.
